summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Configuration Users Management module. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (95%). All CRUD operations for users work correctly. Frontend: Users section fully functional with Desktop/Mobile tabs, user creation form with all required fields, and role dropdown with Desktop and Mobile (terrain) sections.

minor.issue: Intermittent login failure for newly created users - may be timing/race condition

integration_issues.issue: Transient 'Erreur lors du chargement' error message appears briefly - summary endpoint works correctly when tested directly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/config/roles requires authentication (403)
Backend: GET /api/config/roles returns 11 system roles
Backend: 5 Desktop roles present (admin, reception, revenue_manager, accounting, readonly) with is_mobile=false
Backend: 6 Mobile roles present (housekeeping, housekeeper, maintenance, breakfast, spa, restaurant) with is_mobile=true
Backend: GET /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users requires authentication (403)
Backend: GET /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users returns user list with correct structure
Backend: GET /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users?role=housekeeper filters correctly
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users requires authentication (403)
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users creates desktop user (reception) with is_mobile_role=false
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users creates mobile user (housekeeper) with is_mobile_role=true
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users creates mobile user (maintenance) with is_mobile_role=true
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users creates mobile user (spa) with is_mobile_role=true
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users creates mobile user (restaurant) with is_mobile_role=true
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users rejects duplicate email (400)
Backend: POST /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users rejects invalid role (400)
Backend: PUT /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users/{user_id} updates user fields correctly
Backend: PUT /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users/{user_id} role change updates is_mobile_role flag
Backend: DELETE /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users/{user_id} performs soft delete (deactivation)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with manually created mobile user
Frontend: Configuration page loads with Users section visible
Frontend: Users section shows stats cards (Total, Desktop, Mobile, Inactifs)
Frontend: Users section has Desktop/Mobile tabs for filtering
Frontend: 'Ajouter un utilisateur' button visible and clickable
Frontend: User creation modal opens with all required fields
Frontend: Form has email, password, firstname, lastname, role, department, phone, language fields
Frontend: Password field has show/hide toggle and generate button
Frontend: Role dropdown shows 'Desktop' and 'Mobile (terrain)' sections
Frontend: Role dropdown contains Gouvernante, SPA roles
Frontend: 'Rôles Desktop' and 'Rôles Mobile (terrain)' reference sections visible
critical_code_review_comments: SYSTEM_ROLES correctly defines 11 roles: 5 desktop (admin, reception, revenue_manager, accounting, readonly) and 6 mobile (housekeeping, housekeeper, maintenance, breakfast, spa, restaurant)
User creation correctly hashes passwords with bcrypt and stores is_mobile_role based on role
Role change via PUT correctly updates is_mobile_role flag
Soft delete (deactivation) implemented correctly - users are not hard deleted
Frontend UsersSection.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Role dropdown correctly separates Desktop and Mobile sections
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during testing, soft-deleted in cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuration Users module fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/config/roles (system roles), GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/config/hotels/{hotel_id}/users (CRUD). Frontend: UsersSection.jsx in /app/frontend/src/pages/config/components/ with data-testid attributes. Mobile roles: housekeeping, housekeeper, maintenance, breakfast, spa, restaurant. Desktop roles: admin, reception, revenue_manager, accounting, readonly. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_config_users.py

user_crud.create: Working - creates user with hashed password and is_mobile_role flag
user_crud.read: Working - lists users with filtering by role and is_active
user_crud.update: Working - updates fields and recalculates is_mobile_role on role change

frontend_components.users_section: UsersSection.jsx with stats cards, tabs, and user table
frontend_components.user_form: Modal with email, password, name, role, department, phone, language fields
